name: huawei-cloud-cce-cluster-management
description: Huawei Cloud CCE cluster management tools for cluster lifecycle, node pool, node, addon operations, and network prerequisites

tools.name: huawei_list_vpc
tools.description: List VPCs in the region. Returns human-readable attributes: name, cidr, status. Use to find VPC ID for cluster creation. If no VPC found, consider creating one first.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_vpc_subnets
tools.description: List subnets in a VPC. Returns human-readable attributes: name, cidr, availability_zone. Use to find subnet ID for cluster/node creation. Query with vpc_id to filter.

vpc_id.description: VPC ID to filter subnets (optional, lists all subnets if not provided)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_cce_clusters
tools.description: List CCE (Cloud Container Engine) clusters with pagination

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_cce_nodes
tools.description: Get detailed information about nodes in a CCE cluster

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_cce_kubeconfig
tools.description: Get kubeconfig for a CCE cluster. Returns kubeconfig in JSON and YAML format with cluster endpoints information. The kubeconfig can be used with kubectl to manage the cluster.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_create_cce_cluster
tools.description: Create a CCE cluster. Recommended: Turbo cluster (cluster_type=Turbo) with eni network for best performance. Naming format: '<env>-<app>-cluster' (e.g., 'prod-web-cluster'). Use huawei_list_vpc and huawei_list_vpc_subnets to find network resources.

vpc_id.description: VPC ID where the cluster will be created

subnet_id.description: Subnet ID for the cluster network

cluster_type.description: Cluster type. Recommended: 'Turbo' for ENI network (best performance). Options: VirtualMachine, Turbo

container_network_type.description: Container network. Recommended: 'eni' for Turbo, 'overlay_l2' for Standard. Options: overlay_l2, vpc-router, eni

flavor_id.description: Cluster flavor ID (e.g., cce.s1.small, cce.s1.medium, cce.s2.small)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_cluster
tools.description: Delete a CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete the cluster and all its resources. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

delete_evs.description: Whether to delete associated EVS volumes (default: false)

delete_net.description: Whether to delete associated network resources (default: false)

delete_obs.description: Whether to delete associated OBS buckets (default: false)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_update_cce_cluster
tools.description: Update CCE cluster configuration. Allows modifying cluster description, custom specifications, and other cluster settings.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_hibernate_cce_cluster
tools.description: Hibernate (sleep) a CCE cluster to reduce costs. Cluster nodes will be stopped but control plane is preserved.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm hibernation. Without this, operation will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_awake_cce_cluster
tools.description: Awaken (resume) a hibernated CCE cluster. Restarts cluster nodes from hibernation state.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_bind_cce_cluster_eip
tools.description: Bind an EIP (Elastic IP) to a CCE cluster for public API server access.

eip_id.description: EIP ID to bind to the cluster

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_unbind_cce_cluster_eip
tools.description: Unbind an EIP (Elastic IP) from a CCE cluster, disabling public API server access.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_cce_nodepools
tools.description: List node pools in a CCE cluster with pagination

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_resize_cce_nodepool
tools.description: Resize (scale up or down) a CCE node pool to a specific number of nodes. Use this to add or remove nodes in a node pool.

node_count.description: Target node count (desired number of nodes after resize)

scale_group_names.description: Comma-separated list of scale group names to use (default: 'default')

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_cce_nodes
tools.description: List nodes in a CCE cluster with pagination

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_node
tools.description: Delete a node from CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete the node and all its pods. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

scale_down.description: Whether to scale down pods before deleting (default: true)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_cce_node_cordon
tools.description: Cordon a node in CCE cluster. Marks the node as unschedulable, preventing new pods from being scheduled on it.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_cce_node_uncordon
tools.description: Uncordon a node in CCE cluster. Marks the node as schedulable, allowing new pods to be scheduled on it.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_cce_node_drain
tools.description: Drain a node in CCE cluster. Evicts all pods from the node and marks it as unschedulable. Useful for node maintenance.

grace_period.description: Grace period in seconds for pod termination (default: 30)

ignore_daemonsets.description: Ignore DaemonSet pods during drain (default: true)

delete_emptydir_data.description: Continue even if there are pods using emptyDir (default: false)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_cce_node_status
tools.description: Get detailed status information for a specific node in a CCE cluster, including conditions, allocatable resources, and health status.

node_id.description: Node ID to get status for

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_list_cce_addons
tools.description: List installed addons in a CCE cluster

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_get_cce_addon_detail
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific addon in a CCE cluster, including version, status, and configuration.

addon_id.description: Addon ID or addon template name (e.g., coredns, metrics-server)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_create_cce_nodepool
tools.description: Create a node pool in CCE cluster. Recommended naming: '<env>-<role>-pool' (e.g., 'prod-worker-pool'). Start with initial_node_count=2 for HA, or 0 with autoscaling.

availability_zone.description: Availability zone for the node pool (e.g., cn-north-4a)

root_volume_type.description: Root volume type (e.g., SSD, GPSSD, SAS, SATA)

initial_node_count.description: Initial nodes. Recommended: 2 for HA, 0 with autoscaling_enabled=true

os_type.description: Operating system type (e.g., EulerOS, CentOS, Ubuntu)

ssh_key.description: SSH key pair name for node access

password.description: Root password for node access (alternative to ssh_key)

data_volumes.description: JSON array of data volume configurations (e.g., '[{"size":100,"type":"SSD"}]')

subnet_id.description: Subnet ID for the node pool (uses cluster subnet if not specified)

autoscaling_enabled.description: Enable autoscaling. Recommended: true for dynamic scaling. Default: false

min_node_count.description: Minimum node count for autoscaling (required if autoscaling_enabled=true)

max_node_count.description: Maximum node count for autoscaling (required if autoscaling_enabled=true)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_delete_cce_nodepool
tools.description: Delete a node pool from CCE cluster. WARNING: This will delete all nodes in the node pool and their workloads. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before deletion.

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm deletion. Without this, deletion will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_create_cce_node
tools.description: Create nodes directly in cluster (outside node pools). Prefer node pools for managed scaling. Recommended: node_count starts at 2 for HA.

availability_zone.description: Availability zone for the node (e.g., cn-north-4a)

root_volume_type.description: Root volume type (e.g., SSD, GPSSD, SAS, SATA)

os_type.description: Operating system type (e.g., EulerOS, CentOS, Ubuntu)

ssh_key.description: SSH key pair name for node access

password.description: Root password for node access (alternative to ssh_key)

data_volumes.description: JSON array of data volume configurations (e.g., '[{"size":100,"type":"SSD"}]')

subnet_id.description: Subnet ID for the nodes (uses cluster subnet if not specified)

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_install_cce_addon
tools.description: Install an addon in CCE cluster. Common addons: coredns (DNS), metrics-server (monitoring), everest (storage). Use addon_version from huawei_list_cce_addons to check available versions.

addon_template_name.description: Addon template name (e.g., coredns, metrics-server, everest, nginx-ingress)

addon_version.description: Addon version (uses latest compatible version if not specified)

values.description: JSON string of addon configuration values

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_uninstall_cce_addon
tools.description: Uninstall an addon from CCE cluster. WARNING: This may affect cluster functionality depending on the addon. User confirmation (confirm=true) is required before uninstallation.

addon_id.description: Addon ID or addon template name to uninstall

confirm.description: REQUIRED: Set to true to confirm uninstallation. Without this, uninstallation will not proceed.

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)

tools.name: huawei_update_cce_addon
tools.description: Update an addon in CCE cluster. Allows upgrading addon version or modifying configuration values.

addon_id.description: Addon ID or addon template name to update

values.description: JSON string of addon configuration values to update

ak.description: Access Key ID (optional if HUAWEI_AK env is set)

sk.description: Secret Access Key (optional if HUAWEI_SK env is set)

project_id.description: Project ID (optional if HUAWEI_PROJECT_ID env is set)
